name: default
description: Default dispute strategy profile. Detection is never affected: demoted classes stay fully detected and reviewable, but arrive unchecked and therefore unhighlighted and out of the letter unless deliberately re-checked. Rationale: lead with disputes provable from the face of the report; classes whose proof lives in discovery make weak reinvestigation disputes.

missing_payment_history.rationale: File-disclosure claim: absent history on the consumer copy does not prove the file or what is furnished to lenders is wrong. Proof requires ACDV/furnished-data discovery, so this is weak as a reinvestigation dispute.

payment_history_missing_months.rationale: File-disclosure claim: blank months on the consumer copy do not prove the file is incomplete. Proof requires ACDV/furnished-data discovery, so this is weak as a reinvestigation dispute.

payment_history_incomplete_since_open_da.rationale: File-disclosure claim: history missing since the opened date is provable only against the actual file via ACDV/furnished-data discovery, so this is weak as a reinvestigation dispute.

missing_account_number.rationale: Account-identifier detail on the consumer copy is a disclosure question; no ruling supports it as a face-of-report inaccuracy, and proof requires file-level discovery.
